message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

title ApplicationContext.refresh() 方法流程

participant "AbstractApplicationContext" as AAC
participant "GenericApplicationContext" as GAC
participant "ApplicationContextAwareProcessor" as ACAP
participant "AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory" as AACBF
participant "DefaultListableBeanFactory" as DLBF

note over AAC: 以下流程都在refresh()方法内部

== 第1步 ==
activate AAC
AAC -> AAC: 1 prepareRefresh
deactivate AAC
activate AAC
AAC -> AAC: initPropertySources()
note left: 空方法,留给子类重写
deactivate AAC
activate AAC
AAC -> AAC: getEnvironment()
deactivate AAC
activate AAC
AAC -> AAC: validateRequiredProperties()
deactivate AAC
activate AAC
AAC -> AAC: new LinkedHashSet<>()
note left: 泛型ApplicationEvent
deactivate AAC

== 第2步 ==
activate AAC
AAC -> AAC: 2 obtainFreshBeanFactory()
deactivate AAC
activate AAC
AAC -> GAC: refreshBeanFactory()
activate GAC
GAC -> DLBF: new DefaultListableBeanFactory()
activate DLBF
DLBF -> DLBF: setSerializationId(getId())
deactivate DLBF
GAC --> AAC: 未定义变量接收返回值
deactivate GAC
activate AAC
AAC -> GAC: getBeanFactory
activate GAC
GAC --> AAC: 返回 DefaultListableBeanFactory
deactivate GAC
deactivate AAC

== 第3步 ==
activate AAC
AAC -> AAC: 3 prepareBeanFactory
deactivate AAC
note over AAC: 设置BeanFactory的类加载器、支持表达式解析器

activate AAC
note over AAC: 添加Bean后置处理器 例如
AAC -> ACAP: addBeanPostProcessor(new ApplicationContextAwareProcessor(this))
activate ACAP
ACAP -> ACAP: 构造器
deactivate ACAP
ACAP --> AAC: 返回 ApplicationContextAwareProcessor
deactivate AAC

activate AAC
note over AAC: 设置忽略的自动装配的接口 例如
AAC -> AACBF: ignoreDependencyInterface(ApplicationEventPublisherAware.class)
activate AACBF
AACBF -> AACBF: ignoredDependencyInterfaces.add(ifc)
deactivate AACBF
AACBF --> AAC: 未定义变量接收返回值
deactivate AAC

activate AAC
note over AAC: 注册可以解析的自动装配 例如
AAC -> DLBF: registerResolvableDependency(BeanFactory.class, beanFactory)
activate DLBF
note right of DLBF: params { dependencyType, autowiredValue }
DLBF -> DLBF: resolvableDependencies.put();
deactivate DLBF
DLBF --> AAC: 未定义变量接收返回值
deactivate AAC

activate AAC
note over AAC: 添加ApplicationListenerDetector的Bean后置处理器
deactivate AAC
activate AAC
note over AAC: 添加编译时的AspectJ
deactivate AAC
activate AAC
note over AAC: 给BeanFactory中注册一些能用的组件
AAC -> DLBF: registerSingleton(ENVIRONMENT_BEAN_NAME / SYSTEM_PROPERTIES_BEAN_NAME) / SYSTEM_ENVIRONMENT_BEAN_NAME)
activate DLBF
note right of DLBF: params{beanName, singletonObject}
DLBF -> DLBF: addSingleton();
deactivate DLBF
DLBF --> AAC: 未定义变量接收返回值
deactivate AAC

== 第4步 ==
activate AAC
note over AAC: 在应用程序上下文的标准初始化之后修改其内部bean工厂
AAC -> AAC: postProcessBeanFactory(beanFactory);
note left: 空方法 留给子类重写
deactivate AAC

@enduml
```
